title: Unnodu Vazhatha Song Lyrics Amarkalam
stanzas: <div>Unnodu Vazhatha Song Lyrics Amarkalam

Unnodu vazhaatha
vazhvenna vazhvu
en ul nenju solgirandhu

poovodu pesaadha kaatrenna
kaatru oru poonjolai
kaetkindradhu

mannil yaen yaen yaen
neeyum vandhaai
endhan penmai poo pookkave

naan pirakkum munne
ada nee pirandhathen
naan pirakkum podhu
nee undhan kaiyil
ennai yaendha thaano
Unnodu vazhaatha..

Melliya aanmaganai
pennukku pidikkaadhu
muradaa unai rasithaen

thottavum vilundhuvidum
aadavam pidikkaathu
garvam adhai madhithaen

mudi kuthum undhan maarbu
en panju meththaiyo
en uyir pirikkum muthan
adhu panju methaiyo

unnai pole aanillaye
neeyum ponaan naanillaye
neeradippaathe
meen azhuvathillaye
aanmaakkul oodal illai
Unnodu vazhaatha..

nee oru thee endraal
naan kulir kaaiven
anbe theeyaai iru

ne oru mullendraal
naan adhil Roja
anbe mullaai iru

nee veeramaana kallan
ulloorum solludhu
nee eeramaana paarai
en ullam solludhu

unnai moththam nesikkiren
undhan moochai swasikkiren

nee vasikkum kudisai
en maada maaligai
kadhalodu bethamillai

Unnodu vazhaatha
vazhvenna vazhvu
en ul nenju solgirandhu

poovodu pesaadha kaatrenna
kaatru oru poonjolai
kaetkindradhu

mannil yaen yaen yaen
neeyum vandhaai
endhan penmai poo pookkave

naan pirakkum munne
ada nee pirandhathen
naan pirakkum podhu
nee undhan kaiyil
ennai yaendha thaano

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Unnodu Vazhatha'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotions of a lover yearning for their beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Amarkalam'?

In Amarkalam, the song reflects the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by K.S. Chitra and composed by Bharadwaj.

When was 'Unnodu Vazhatha' released?

The song was released on August 13, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unnodu Vazhatha, the lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love and yearning, making it a perfect romantic ballad. The song captures the essence of longing, as the protagonist expresses their heartfelt feelings towards their beloved. With its soothing melody and K.S. Chitra's captivating voice, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track is a cherished gem for anyone celebrating love or reminiscing about past relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unnodu Vazhatha from Amarkalam is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With K.S. Chitra's enchanting vocals and Bharadwaj's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of romance. Dive into this nostalgic track that evokes heartfelt emotions and memories.
stanzaMeanings: I will live with you, my heart is telling me this life is for you.
The flower doesn't speak, the wind is asking for a flower.
Why, why, why did you come to my life, to make my girl bloom?
Before I was born, you were born; when I was born, you held me in your hands.
A gentle man is not liked by women, I have enjoyed you.
Touching and falling down, pride doesn't like that, I have experienced it.
Your hair is like a soft cloud, my life will be like a pearl, that soft cloud.
You are not like anyone else, I am not like you, the fish doesn't cry in the water, there is no quarrel in the soul.
If you are a fire, I will cool down, my love, be a flame.
If you are a thorn, I will be a rose, my love, be a flower.
You are a brave thief, everyone says, you are a great treasure, my heart says.
I love you completely, I breathe your scent.
Your home where you live, my palace, has no shame in love.
I will live with you, my heart is telling me this life is for you.
The flower doesn't speak, the wind is asking for a flower.
Why, why, why did you come to my life, to make my girl bloom?
Before I was born, you were born; when I was born, you held me in your hands.
